spec.name: The Secret Room
spec.description: There is dust all over the place. It looks like nobody has been here for ages. In the middle of the room you see a socket with a crystal globe. The globe glows with a pulsing light. To the north you see a stone door. To the south you see a grey block.

north.description: You see a round stone door.

extra_descs.description: The socket looks like the work of a dwarf. It is VERY beautiful.
The crystal globe is glowing with a pulsing light. It looks like there is smoke inside it.
